  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "Consider a simple game where two players, A and B, choose between two strategies, Cooperate (C) and Defect (D). The payoff matrix for this game is as follows:
      |   | C   | D   |
      |---|-----|-----|
      | C | (5,5) | (0,0) |
      | D | (0,0) | (3,3) |
      The players can randomize their strategies. What is the Nash Equilibrium for this game?",
      "type": "long_answer",
      "marks": 10,
      "hint": "Payoff matrix shows the payoffs fo
